description: Swarm Autonomous Delivery System - add authoritative delivery state, gated execution, recovery, small-MR enforcement, and a dedicated run UI so Swarm can complete real delivery loops from planning through retrospective.

userStories.title: Create SQLite schema for swarm runs and roles
userStories.description: As a platform engineer, I want `SwarmRun` and `RoleSpec` stored in SQLite so that delivery runs and role definitions have one authoritative source of truth.
acceptanceCriteria: Add SQLite persistence for `SwarmRun` with `id`, `goal`, `status`, `phase`, `created_at`, `updated_at`, and `owner_session_id`
Add SQLite persistence for `RoleSpec` with `role_id`, `name`, `responsibility`, `skills`, `limits`, and `approval_required`
Define shared enum or validation support for run status and phase values in the schema layer
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Added `swarm_run` and `role_spec` SQLite tables, shared delivery run status/phase validators, migration, and coverage for persistence plus schema columns.

userStories.title: Create SQLite schema for work items
userStories.description: As a delivery engine, I want `WorkItem` records persisted in SQLite so that planned work, dependencies, and verification metadata survive interruptions.
acceptanceCriteria: Add SQLite persistence for `WorkItem` with `id`, `title`, `status`, `owner_role_id`, `blocked_by`, `scope`, `phase_gate`, and `verification`
Persist `small_mr_required` and dependency data on each work item
Validate work item status and phase-gate values in the shared schema layer
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Added the `work_item` SQLite table, shared work status and phase-gate validators, a generated migration, and storage coverage for persisted dependency, scope, verification, and small-MR fields.

userStories.title: Create SQLite schema for decisions and open questions
userStories.description: As a conductor, I want `Decision` and `OpenQuestion` stored as first-class records so that unresolved ambiguities and final conclusions are durable and auditable.
acceptanceCriteria: Add SQLite persistence for `Decision` with `id`, `kind`, `summary`, `source`, `status`, `requires_user_confirmation`, `applies_to`, `related_question_id`, `decided_by`, and `decided_at`
Add SQLite persistence for `OpenQuestion` with `id`, `title`, `context`, `options`, `recommended_option`, `status`, `deadline_policy`, `blocking`, `affects`, `related_decision_id`, and `raised_by`
Validate the allowed `Decision.status` and `OpenQuestion.status` transition values in shared schema code
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Added `decision` and `open_question` SQLite tables, shared status enums plus transition helpers for both lifecycles, a generated migration, and storage coverage for persisted decision/question fields.

userStories.title: Add a shared delivery store around SQLite state
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want all delivery-state reads and writes to go through one shared module so that SQLite stays the only authoritative write path.
acceptanceCriteria: Route `SwarmRun`, `RoleSpec`, `WorkItem`, `Decision`, and `OpenQuestion` CRUD through one shared store module
Reject invalid state transitions for delivery objects in the shared store layer
Keep SharedBoard or UI consumers read-only or projection-only relative to authoritative SQLite state
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Added `packages/opencode/src/delivery/store.ts` as the authoritative SQLite CRUD layer for runs, roles, work items, decisions, and questions; enforced delivery transition guards there; and covered the shared store plus transition helpers with targeted storage tests.

userStories.title: Launch a swarm run with a staged delivery plan
userStories.description: As a user, I want a launch flow that turns a goal into a persisted staged run so that Swarm starts from a recoverable plan instead of transient prompt state.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a launch entrypoint that creates a `SwarmRun` from a high-level delivery goal
Persist the default phases `plan`, `implement`, `verify`, `commit`, and `retrospective` for new runs
Store planned work items with owner role, scope, dependencies, and expected verification during planning
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Added `DeliveryStore.launch()` as the authoritative staged-plan entrypoint, persisted ordered run phases plus run-linked work items, wired `Swarm.launch()` through it, and covered the flow with delivery-store and swarm launch tests.

userStories.title: Persist phase gate evaluation and transitions
userStories.description: As a user, I want phase progression controlled by persisted gates so that runs only advance when the required conditions are actually satisfied.
acceptanceCriteria: Define enter, exit, and fallback rules for `plan`, `implement`, `verify`, `commit`, and `retrospective`
Persist gate results and blocked reasons back onto the run and affected work items
Prevent phase advancement while required decisions or blocking open questions remain unresolved
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Added shared enter/exit/fallback gate rules plus persisted `gate` JSON on `swarm_run` and `work_item`, wired `DeliveryStore.evaluateRun()` and guarded phase advancement through gate checks, and covered blocked decision/question transitions in delivery-store/schema tests.

userStories.title: Assign work items and detect major role changes
userStories.description: As a conductor, I want role assignment and major-change detection persisted on work items so that only meaningful role shifts require user review.
acceptanceCriteria: Assign each work item to a `RoleSpec` and persist the owner role id
Detect major assignment changes for role adds, role removals, role responsibility changes, and cross-role owner reassignments
Allow ordinary same-role scheduling adjustments without triggering confirmation
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Added `DeliveryStore.reviewAssignments()` and `DeliveryStore.assign()` so work-item owner changes stay tied to `RoleSpec` assignments, major role/owner deltas are detected before mutation, and same-role scheduling updates apply without confirmation; covered the behavior in delivery-store tests.

userStories.title: Create confirmation-backed role reassignment flow
userStories.description: As a user, I want major role changes to pause behind an explicit confirmation record so that assignment authority stays visible and reversible.
acceptanceCriteria: Create an `OpenQuestion` with before and after state, reason, recommended option, and impact when a major role change is proposed
Keep the related `Decision` in `proposed` until the user resolves the question
Apply confirmed or rejected outcomes back through `Decision` updates rather than direct object mutation
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Added `DeliveryStore.requestAssignment()` and `DeliveryStore.resolveAssignment()` so major role changes create linked `Decision` and `OpenQuestion` records with before/after proposal state, remain blocked behind confirmation, and apply confirmed or rejected outcomes through decision resolution instead of direct mutation.

userStories.title: Record structured decision proposals and consensus actions
userStories.description: As a conductor, I want proposal, review, objection, and decision actions tied to one record so that consensus happens through structured state instead of free-text chatter.
acceptanceCriteria: Store `proposal`, `review`, `objection`, and `decision` actions against a single `Decision` record
Persist participant roles, candidate outcomes, and input context for proposed decisions
Reject consensus actions that are not linked to a concrete `Decision` id
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Extended `decision` persistence with `participants`, `candidate_outcomes`, `input_context`, and `actions`, added `DeliveryStore.recordDecision()` for structured `proposal`/`review`/`objection`/`decision` entries on one record, and covered the proposal plus missing-id rejection flow in delivery schema/store tests.

userStories.title: Resolve decisions through agreement or conductor arbitration
userStories.description: As a conductor, I want deterministic decision resolution rules so that aligned proposals auto-resolve and sufficiently informed conflicts can be settled without vague debate.
acceptanceCriteria: Automatically mark a decision as `decided` when required participants align and the recorded inputs are sufficient
Allow conductor arbitration for informed conflicts that do not cross a user-confirmation boundary
Persist final reason, `decided_by`, `decided_at`, and affected object updates on the resolved decision
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Updated `DeliveryStore.recordDecision()` to auto-resolve aligned non-confirmation decisions, allow conductor arbitration for informed conflicts, and persist final resolution metadata as JSON on the terminal decision action; extended delivery-store regression coverage for both paths.

userStories.title: Implement open-question lifecycle and gate recomputation
userStories.description: As a worker, I want unresolved questions tracked through an explicit lifecycle so that blocking ambiguity stays visible and gates recompute when answers arrive.
acceptanceCriteria: Support `open -> waiting_user -> answered -> resolved`, `open -> deferred`, and `open|waiting_user -> cancelled` transitions for `OpenQuestion`
Pause affected work items for blocking questions and re-check deferred questions before the next related gate
Recompute related gates and sync the linked decision outcome when a question is closed or downgraded
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Tightened the shared question transition graph, taught `DeliveryStore.updateQuestion()` to clear blocking and sync linked decision outcomes on resolve/defer/cancel, re-block deferred questions when their affected gate becomes current, and covered the lifecycle with delivery schema/store regressions.

userStories.title: Add work-item checkpoints and failure evidence
userStories.description: As a user, I want each work item to capture checkpoints and failure evidence so that recovery preserves context instead of erasing what went wrong.
acceptanceCriteria: Store last successful phase, verification result, produced files, pending actions, and rollback suggestions per work item
Preserve failure evidence instead of clearing progress when verification or pre-commit work fails
Keep the current worktree intact by default and require an explicit `Decision` before destructive cleanup is allowed
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Added authoritative `work_item.checkpoint` and `work_item.failure` JSON persistence, taught `DeliveryStore.updateItem()` to preserve checkpoint state while snapshotting verify/commit failures, and required a decided `destructive_cleanup` decision before `DeliveryStore.allowCleanup()` can unlock destructive cleanup.

userStories.title: Restore interrupted runs from authoritative state
userStories.description: As a user, I want interrupted runs to resume from stored state and checkpoints so that long autonomous delivery loops do not restart from scratch.
acceptanceCriteria: Resume an existing run by loading authoritative SQLite records before checkpoints and active decisions or questions
Treat stale or conflicting checkpoints as expired and stop behind a new decision or open question when state is inconsistent
Cover interrupted planning, implementation failure, verification failure, and pre-commit interruption recovery paths
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Enforce single-thread small-MR execution
userStories.description: As a developer, I want P1 delivery to enforce one active story path through commit so that each change stays independently verifiable and recoverable.
acceptanceCriteria: Mark each work item with `small_mr_required=true`
Allow only one active implementation path per story through commit in P1
Block commit until the work item has passing verification and maps to exactly one story or feature point
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Execute local commit phase with audit writeback
userStories.description: As a developer, I want successful story work committed locally with structured metadata so that P1 delivery closes the loop without reaching into remote merge flows.
acceptanceCriteria: Allow the commit phase to produce a local `git commit` only after small-MR and verification checks pass
Persist staged scope, verification proof, commit hash or message, and post-commit status on the linked work item and run
Do not create PR or MR records or trigger remote merge behavior in P1
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Persist structured audit logs and resume lookup
userStories.description: As an operator, I want structured audit history and a resume index so that delivery runs can be inspected and resumed without replaying chat history.
acceptanceCriteria: Record structured audit events for phase changes, assignments, decisions, open questions, verification results, and commits per run
Provide a resume lookup that identifies completed and incomplete work items from stored state and audit data
Do not re-queue already verified and committed stories when a run is resumed
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add retrospective output and durable memory extraction
userStories.description: As a conductor, I want every run to end with a structured retrospective so that reusable lessons are kept while noisy execution details are filtered out.
acceptanceCriteria: Move completed or failed runs into `retrospective` before final completion is recorded
Link retrospective output to work items, decisions, verification results, failures, escalations, and collaboration issues
Only auto-write durable memories that pass reuse filters; require human confirmation for architecture, security, or other high-impact strategy memories
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Expose swarm delivery read models and routes
userStories.description: As a client developer, I want server-side delivery read models so that CLI and web surfaces can inspect runs, work items, questions, and decisions from one API contract.
acceptanceCriteria: Add server read models or routes for `SwarmRun`, `WorkItem`, `Decision`, `OpenQuestion`, current phase gate, blockers, and small-MR results
Project route payloads from authoritative SQLite delivery state instead of reconstructing them from free-text logs
Regenerate the JavaScript SDK after route schema changes
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add delivery confirmation and question write routes
userStories.description: As a user, I want server-side write paths for confirmations and question handling so that UI and CLI actions can safely resolve delivery blockers.
acceptanceCriteria: Add write routes for major role-change confirmation and for answering, deferring, or cancelling open questions
Route handlers update state only through shared `Decision` and `OpenQuestion` workflows
Regenerate the JavaScript SDK after route schema changes
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Build the SwarmRun overview page
userStories.description: As a user, I want a dedicated `SwarmRun` page so that I can understand the current phase, gate result, blockers, and work-item state without digging through session internals.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a dedicated `SwarmRun` page that shows run status, current phase, gate result, blockers, and linked work items
Reach the page from existing session navigation while keeping the main detail view separate from the session page body
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add decision and confirmation panels to the SwarmRun page
userStories.description: As a user, I want to inspect decisions and resolve pending confirmations from the run page so that major role changes and open questions stay actionable.
acceptanceCriteria: Show linked decisions and open questions with recommended option, impact summary, and current status on the `SwarmRun` page
Allow users to confirm major role changes and answer, defer, or cancel open questions from the page
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Show small-MR results and audit history in the UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want verification, commit, and audit details visible on the run page so that I can quickly see what shipped, what is blocked, and why.
acceptanceCriteria: Show per-story verification status, local commit result, and structured audit history on the `SwarmRun` page
Make it possible to identify the current phase, blocker, and pending confirmations from the UI within 30 seconds
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes
